status.label: Status
home.title: Bypass blocks
home.subtitle: Select a strategy and press the button
strategy.winws_not_started: winws.exe did not start. Run Zapret UI as administrator.
strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.subtitle: Zapret launch configs (.bat). Select a file on the left, edit and save.
strategies.hint: Niko_ALT11 is a custom strategy by Niko. Lists opens .txt files referenced by the selected .bat.
strategies.select_first: Select a config (.bat) on the left first
service.title: Service
service.subtitle: Service management, filter settings, updates and security
service.start_ui_tray: Start Zapret UI in tray on Windows login
service.start_bypass_on_login: Start bypass on login (when zapret service is not active)
service.minimize_to_tray: Minimize to tray when minimizing the window
service.ui_tray_enabled: Zapret UI will start in the tray when you log in to Windows.
service.ui_tray_disabled: Zapret UI autostart in tray disabled.
service.install_ok:
zapret service installed and started.
Strategy: {0}
service.updates_hint: Zapret UI and Flowseal versions are checked on startup. Installation requires your confirmation.
service.network_desc: Required if you previously used VPN or proxy settings. They leave traces in the system — for example, Epic Games may show offline mode even when the internet works.
service.network_cmds: Runs: netsh int ip reset, winhttp reset proxy, winsock reset, IPv4/IPv6 reset, TCP range 10000–30000, ipconfig /flushdns.
service.security_desc: Antivirus (Defender) exclusions and firewall rules for Zapret UI and winws.exe.
service.language_desc: Choose interface language. A restart is required to apply changes.
lang.restart_confirm: Language changed. Restart the application now?
tray.balloon: Bypass is running — app is in the tray. Double-click the icon to open.
bootstrap.title: Zapret UI — component setup
bootstrap.heading: Downloading zapret
bootstrap.desc: Downloading Flowseal configs (zapret-discord-youtube) from GitHub. This is needed once — then everything works automatically.
update.app_ready:
Zapret UI update package {0} downloaded.

Install now?
update.flowseal_reinstall:
Reinstall Flowseal components from GitHub?

The zapret folder will be downloaded again (including utils\test zapret.ps1).
Your .bat and lists edits may be overwritten.
update.app_up_to_date:
Zapret UI is up to date.
Version: {0}
update.flowseal_up_to_date:
Flowseal is up to date.
Version: {0}
network.reset_confirm:
Reset Windows network settings?

netsh commands and DNS flush will run. This helps remove VPN and proxy traces.

Administrator rights required. A reboot is recommended after reset.

Continue?
dialog.ipset_ok: ipset-all.txt list updated successfully from Flowseal repository.
startup.log_check: Startup version check: Zapret UI {0}, Flowseal {1}
startup.all_up_to_date: All components are up to date
power.resume_restarting: Restoring bypass after resume from sleep...
power.resume_restarted: Bypass restored after resume from sleep.
tools.title: Console and diagnostics
tools.subtitle: Operation output, system checks and strategy tests
tools.test_subtitle: Test runs here — type answers in the field below (like in PowerShell)
tools.test_input_hint: Input (Enter to send; for «Press any key» type a character and press Enter):
tools.test_script_missing: test zapret.ps1 not found in zapret\utils. Update Flowseal in Service tab.
tools.test_subtitle_visual: Left: live target checks. Right: ranked preset results. Choose test type before start.
tools.test_mode_standard_hint: Site reachability and ping checks for each .bat
tools.test_mode_dpi_hint: Tests for 16–20 KB freeze blocking pattern (DPI checkers)
tools.test_status_idle: Choose test type and click Start test.
tools.test_status_done: Test complete. You can apply the best result.
tools.test_scores_hint: Best at top. ✓ — clean, ≈ — partial, ✗ — many failures.
tools.test_targets_empty: Targets appear after the test starts.
tools.test_scores_empty: Results appear as strategies are tested.
tools.intro: Zapret UI console — output is shown here.
update.download_complete: Download complete. Package is ready to install.
update.flowseal_done_restart:
Flowseal components reinstalled.
Restart Zapret UI to apply changes.
update.install_dont_close: Do not close this window until installation completes.
update.install_access_denied:
Could not replace files: bypass or WinDivert is still active.

Stop the preset, close Zapret UI, and try updating again.
update.bypass_active_hint: Bypass is currently running. It will be stopped automatically before the update, and the app will close.
strategies.dialog.copy_prompt: Enter a name for the copy (a new .bat will be created from the selected file):
strategies.rename_builtin_confirm:
Rename built-in config {0}?
Consider creating a copy to keep the original.
strategies.delete_builtin_confirm:
Delete built-in config {0}?
Prefer deleting only copies and custom files.
strategies.delete_confirm: Delete config {0}? The file will be removed from disk.
strategies.dialog.new_prompt: Enter name for new .bat (based on general.bat):
lists.hint: Only .txt files from lists/ referenced in the selected .bat are shown. After adding a new list to the config, click Refresh.
lists.no_refs: No lists/*.txt references found in config
lists.missing_on_disk: {0} — referenced in config but missing in lists/
lists.cannot_delete_builtin: Cannot delete built-in lists (list-general.txt, list-google.txt, etc.). You can delete user (*-user.txt) and manually created files.
lists.delete_confirm: Delete list file {0} from lists/ folder?
lists.new_file_comment: # Add domains or IPs (one per line)

network.reset_ok: Reset complete. A reboot is recommended.
network.log_done: Done. Reboot your computer to apply changes.
setup.title: Zapret UI setup — Niko
setup.heading: Security setup
setup.desc: Zapret uses WinDivert and winws.exe — antivirus and firewall may block them. We recommend adding exclusions now (administrator rights required).
setup.defender: Add folders to Windows Defender exclusions
setup.firewall: Allow ZapretUI.exe and winws.exe in Windows Firewall
strategies.file_exists: A file with this name already exists
lists.cannot_delete_bundled: Cannot delete built-in list {0}. You can delete user and manually created files.
